summary: Stratification paragraph in Part 2b §2b.1 replaced with templated version covering all 5 verdict buckets present in CA_NONE (Unfalsifiable=2, Self-Contradicted=12, Misleading=10, Std Model Explains=11, Refuted by Data=8) plus Not Demonstrated=0. The orthogonal relabels axis (28 of 43 CA_NONE) moved to its own paragraph so it is no longer conflated with verdict stratification. Requires 12 new template placeholders ({{CA_NONE_UNFAL}}, _SC, _MISLEADING, _STDMODEL, _REFUTED, _NOTDEMO, _RELABELS, and matching _IDS variants) added to build-scripts/generate-html.js and section-loader.js, plus a build-time sum-check assertion. Filter expressions are specified in the EXP. Tightly coupled with ISS-2251 (contrast paragraph in same section) — recommend processing in the same decider cycle.
